_doc: Registry that drives the collector. Each routine declares a 'freshness' source (where its real output lands) and an optional 'scan' (log error/warn patterns). Health is reconstructed from artifacts so the collector needs no scheduler access. Paths may use {HOME} and {today} (Europe/Copenhagen YYYY-MM-DD) tokens.

private._doc: This is a PUBLIC repo. Any freshness/scan source resolving under these roots is strategy-bearing and local-only; the collector must NOT copy its raw commit subjects or log lines into status.json/index.html — only a sanitized health phrase. Specifics go to the private push notification, never the public page.

projects.name: Holdet TDF bot
projects.goal: Autonomously field the optimal holdet.dk Tour de France 2026 team every single day and beat the human field — hands-off, with only a human veto.
projects.constraints: Follow the project's own CLAUDE.md and the holdet-tdf-bot skill, which document its guardrails and protected paths.
projects.note: Pre-Tour: stage 1 startlist still pending, so the daily brains correctly report 'no material change'. Watch for Tour start.

projects.name: Personal stock dashboard
projects.goal: A calm, trust-first decision instrument that tells me — in one glance — the single sized move my broker never would, and honestly says 'do nothing' when that's right.
projects.constraints: Open a small PR to main and keep CI green. Public repo: demo data only, never real positions or secrets.

projects.name: Alexanders Brief
projects.goal: Publish a trustworthy, beautifully-edited Danish morning brief every day before 06:40 — sharper and broader than any single newspaper.
projects.constraints: Follow prompts/daily-brief.md and the project's guardrails; never expose any secrets or credentials; publish at most once per date.

projects.name: Routine Overview
projects.goal: Hold the whole picture across every routine and interrupt Alexander only when something genuinely needs him.
projects.constraints: Keep it public-safe: health/status only, no secrets or strategy internals. Verify with node scripts/collect.mjs && node scripts/render.mjs before pushing.

routines.name: Routine secretary (this)
routines.does: Refreshes this overview from artifact-truth and flags only what needs attention.

routines.name: Overview self-improve
routines.does: Ships one low-risk, high-reward maintenance/design improvement to this overview per run (or nothing), toward the Anthropic aesthetic.

routines.name: Daily news brief
routines.does: Researches, validates and publishes the Danish morning brief before the 06:40 deadline.

routines.name: Rolling weekly (Ugen)
routines.does: Refreshes the 7-day rollup edition from the published dailies.

routines.name: Daily deadline check
routines.does: Verifies today's brief published before 06:40; push-alerts only on a confirmed miss.

routines.name: Health monitor
routines.does: Checks the live brief pages are reachable; push-alerts only on confirmed failure.

routines.name: Dashboard self-improve
routines.does: Ships at most ONE strictly-better improvement to the stock dashboard per run via reviewed PR (or nothing).

routines.name: Stock maintenance
routines.does: Structural maintenance passes on the stock dashboard.
routines.review: Overlaps 'Dashboard self-improve' — both daily maintainer passes on the stock repo (02:00 and 13:00). Worth confirming both still earn their slot.

routines.name: Watchlist integration
routines.does: Integrates watchlist companies queued as GitHub issues into the dashboard via reviewable PR.

freshness.note: Only acts when integrate-issues are queued; idle is normal.

routines.name: Holdet dashboard improve
routines.does: One safe read-only improvement to the holdet dashboard, then publishes the refreshed page.

routines.name: Holdet auditor
routines.does: Red-team audit + fixer of the holdet bot (third brain).

routines.name: Holdet LLM brain
routines.does: Daily team brain — keeps one stable plan, re-deciding only on material change.

routines.name: Holdet self-improve
routines.does: Hourly guardian: verifies the live system still works; fixes at most one verified issue.
routines.review: Paused — the live-system guardian is off.

routines.name: Holdet Team B cycle
routines.does: Forced swap + new captain each run on the Team B entry; auto-stops when the Tour starts.

routines.name: Maintenance and improvements
routines.does: "Do maintenance: improve structure" — target project not specified in the routine name.
routines.review: Purpose/target is vague and it's unassigned to any project — decide what it targets (it may overlap another project's maintenance routine) or whether it still earns its daily slot.

routines.name: Holdet routine self-test
routines.does: One-time check that routines run under the Max account and can write bot files.

launchd.name: Holdet evening pass (launchd)
launchd.does: Full daily chain: collect → decide → notify+veto → execute+verify on holdet.dk.

launchd.name: Holdet DNS guard (launchd)
launchd.does: Morning start-list re-check for non-starters (DNS) before the stage.

launchd.name: Holdet watch sentinel (launchd)
launchd.does: Hourly read-only sentinel; reconciles results and flags material change.

launchd.name: Holdet improve loop (launchd)
launchd.does: Backtest + optimize weights; proposes at most one verified improvement.

thresholds._doc: Staleness multipliers on periodHours. green < warnAt; yellow warnAt..staleAt; red > staleAt.
